ew_context: Silver appears to be in impulse wave 3 following breakout above key resistance — momentum suggesting continuation of primary uptrend
pattern_desc: Breakout above critical resistance level at 76.08 with 5 previous touches. Strong momentum confirmed by RSI at 86.6% and bullish EMA alignment
key_levels: Support: 75.21 (stop level), 76.08 (broken resistance now support). Resistance: 77.45 (swing high)
invalidation: Close below 75.20 on H1 timeframe would negate the breakout
market_context: US-Iran ceasefire reduces safe-haven demand but industrial silver benefits from broader risk-on sentiment and potential infrastructure spending
